title: 配置虚拟机 MMIO 地址空间（GPU-P/DDA 大 BAR）
title_en: Configure Virtual Machine MMIO Address Space (GPU-P/DDA Large BAR)
code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){ return 7 }; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p }; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vmName = 'WMITEST_mmio_gap'
$vm = $null
try {
  # 创建第二代测试虚拟机
  $vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName = $vmName
  $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
  $vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  # 获取虚拟机的活动设置实例
  $vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
  $vssd2 = [wmi]$vssd2.__PATH
  # MMIO 间隙属性(MB)位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData，而非 Msvm_MemorySettingData
  $vssd2.LowMmioGapSize  = [uint64]512
  $vssd2.HighMmioGapSize = [uint64]32768
  $r2 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
  if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $r2.Job }
  # 读回验证
  $vssd3 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
  $vssd3 = [wmi]$vssd3.__PATH
  Write-Output ("LowMmioGapSize=" + $vssd3.LowMmioGapSize + " HighMmioGapSize=" + $vssd3.HighMmioGapSize + " HighMmioGapBase=" + $vssd3.HighMmioGapBase)
}
finally {
  if($vm){ $d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $d.Job } }
}
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){ return 7 }; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p }; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vmName = 'WMITEST_mmio_gap'
$vm = $null
try {
  # Create a Generation 2 test virtual machine
  $vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName = $vmName
  $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
  $vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  # Obtain the active setting data instance of the VM
  $vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
  $vssd2 = [wmi]$vssd2.__PATH
  # The MMIO gap properties (in MB) reside on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData, not on Msvm_MemorySettingData
  $vssd2.LowMmioGapSize  = [uint64]512
  $vssd2.HighMmioGapSize = [uint64]32768
  $r2 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
  if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $r2.Job }
  # Read back to verify
  $vssd3 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
  $vssd3 = [wmi]$vssd3.__PATH
  Write-Output ("LowMmioGapSize=" + $vssd3.LowMmioGapSize + " HighMmioGapSize=" + $vssd3.HighMmioGapSize + " HighMmioGapBase=" + $vssd3.HighMmioGapBase)
}
finally {
  if($vm){ $d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $d.Job } }
}
output:
BEFORE LowMmioGapSize=128 HighMmioGapSize=512 HighMmioGapBase=65024
AFTER  LowMmioGapSize=512 HighMmioGapSize=32768 HighMmioGapBase=65024
ASSERT PASS: LowMmioGapSize=512 (want 512), HighMmioGapSize=32768 (want 32768)
RESULT: PASS
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096
notes: LowMmioGapSize / HighMmioGapSize / HighMmioGapBase 三个属性位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData(VSSD)，而非 Msvm_MemorySettingData；后者不含这些字段。
因此应通过 ModifySystemSettings(vssd.GetText(1)) 下发，而非 ModifyResourceSettings。
单位为 MB。第二代虚拟机默认值：LowMmioGapSize=128、HighMmioGapSize=512、HighMmioGapBase=65024(只读)。
DDA/GPU-P 映射大 BAR 设备时通常需要增大 HighMmioGapSize。
HighMmioGapBase 为只读属性(access 仅 Read)，由系统计算得出，不可写入。
虚拟机处于离线(未运行)状态即可修改这些属性，无需启动。ModifySystemSettings 返回 4096(异步 Job)，须用 Wait-Job2 等待完成。
notes_en: The three properties LowMmioGapSize / HighMmioGapSize / HighMmioGapBase reside on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData (VSSD), not on Msvm_MemorySettingData; the latter does not contain these fields.
They must therefore be applied through ModifySystemSettings(vssd.GetText(1)), not ModifyResourceSettings.
The unit is MB. Generation 2 VM defaults: LowMmioGapSize=128, HighMmioGapSize=512, HighMmioGapBase=65024 (read-only).
Mapping large-BAR devices via DDA/GPU-P typically requires increasing HighMmioGapSize.
HighMmioGapBase is a read-only property (access is Read only), computed by the system and not writable.

These properties can be modified while the VM is offline (not running); it does not need to be started. ModifySystemSettings returns 4096 (asynchronous job), which must be awaited with Wait-Job2 until completion.
